lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in good condition. It shows minor cosmetic wear on the exterior and interior. All mechanical systems are fully operational and the vehicle has been well-maintained.
Mint condition.

Experience automotive perfection with this absolute gem! This vehicle is in pristine, showroom condition, boasting flawless paint and an interior that looks and smells brand new. It has been meticulously maintained to the highest standard, offering a smooth, factory-fresh driving experience that is truly rare to find. This is a top-tier find for any serious buyer seeking the very best!

This vehicle is in mint condition. Both the interior and exterior are in original condition with no signs of wear or damage. All mechanical and electrical systems are fully functional and have been maintained according to factory standards.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The exterior presents well, though you will find a few minor stone chips on the front end and a small scuff on the rear bumper consistent with normal use. Mechanically, the car is solid, shifts smoothly, and has received regular oil changes and scheduled maintenance. Inside, the cabin is clean and free of odors, with only slight wear on the driver's seat bolster. It is a dependable, attractive vehicle that offers a great balance of performance and reliability for its next owner.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-maintained. The exterior paint retains a healthy shine, though there are a few minor stone chips on the front bumper and some light surface scratches from normal use. The interior is clean and well-kept, showing only minimal wear on the upholstery. Mechanically, the car is sound, with all features and electronics operating as they should. It provides a smooth, reliable driving experience and represents a well-cared-for example of this model.

Presenting an exceptional vehicle of unrivaled caliber. This specimen remains in pristine, showroom condition, reflecting meticulous stewardship and an uncompromising commitment to maintenance. Every surface and mechanical component adheres to the highest standards of automotive excellence. An investment-grade acquisition for the discerning driver who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! You seriously have to see this beauty in person. It’s in absolutely incredible shape—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it, and it drives like a total dream. If you’re looking for something that’s practically perfect and ready for its next adventure, this is the one. Come take it for a spin, I promise you’re going to love it!

This is a superlative example of the E92 chassis, featuring the legendary S65 naturally aspirated 4.0L V8 with individual throttle bodies and an 8,400 RPM redline. This unit remains in concours-grade condition, with documented preventative maintenance including rod bearing replacement and fresh throttle actuators. The powerplant is mated to a precise 6-speed manual transmission and a factory M Variable Differential Lock, ensuring optimal mechanical grip and torque vectoring. The vehicle retains its structural rigidity and low center of gravity via the pristine carbon fiber roof. With a flawless undercarriage and meticulously maintained Electronic Damper Control (EDC) suspension, this specimen delivers the exact turn-in response and lateral stability intended by the engineers in Garching.
Mint condition. One owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. Inspection welcome.

This vehicle is a true collector’s dream, preserved in showroom condition since day one. The exterior features a flawless, mirror-like finish with zero chips or imperfections, while the interior remains in a pristine state, still carrying that new-car scent with no signs of wear on the premium upholstery. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach; it has been meticulously maintained with a complete, documented service history and has been exclusively garage-kept under a climate-controlled environment. Every button, sensor, and mechanical component functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. This is a rare opportunity to own a virtually untouched example of automotive excellence, offering a driving experience that is indistinguishable from new.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Presented in showroom condition, it features an impeccable exterior finish and a pristine cabin that mirrors its original factory delivery. Every component has been meticulously inspected to ensure it meets our exacting standards for excellence. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands uncompromising quality, this offering stands as a testament to superior maintenance and care.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This vehicle exhibits an immaculate exterior finish and a pristine interior cabin, mirroring its original showroom state. Mechanically flawless and aesthetically peerless, it represents a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast seeking uncompromising quality.

Hey there! You’ve seriously got to see this car—it’s basically like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such incredible care of it, and it still has that fresh new-car feel. It runs like a dream and looks absolutely flawless inside and out. I’m honestly sad to let it go, but I know the next owner is going to absolutely love it. Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin!

Available is an investment-grade E46 M3, showcasing the pinnacle of the S54B32 naturally aspirated inline-six. This example features a precise 6-speed Getrag 420G manual transmission and a fully serviced VANOS system. The chassis has undergone comprehensive subframe reinforcement to ensure structural integrity under high lateral loads. Performance is optimized via a factory-spec variable M differential lock and a pristine suspension geometry. The rod bearings have been proactively replaced with high-performance shells to ensure longevity. This is a mechanically flawless specimen with zero deferred maintenance, offering a pure, unadulterated driving experience.
Mint condition. Single owner. Low mileage. Garage-kept. Full service records included. No accidents. Pristine interior.

This vehicle is a true collector-grade specimen that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line. The exterior paint is finished in a deep, lustrous gloss with absolutely zero imperfections, swirls, or stone chips, having been preserved in a climate-controlled garage and protected by a professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in pristine condition; the premium leather seats show no signs of bolster wear, the original factory scent lingers, and every electronic component functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, preserved in impeccable condition. It features a flawless exterior finish and a meticulously maintained interior that reflects a standard of care rarely seen on the secondary market. Mechanically robust and aesthetically superior, this specimen offers a turn-key opportunity for the sophisticated collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unrivaled caliber. This vehicle exemplifies an impeccable standard of preservation, having been maintained with exacting precision. Its aesthetic and mechanical integrity mirror its original showroom delivery state, offering a rare opportunity for the discerning driver who demands absolute perfection.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, it’s a total stunner. It looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor—completely flawless inside and out! I’ve taken incredible care of it, so it’s basically in brand-new condition and drives like a dream. If you're looking for perfection, you’ve found it. Come by and see it for yourself; you're going to love it!

This collector-grade E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated performance. The S54 power plant exhibits perfect compression across all cylinders, with a recently calibrated double-VANOS system and shimmed valves for optimal timing. The drivetrain features the desirable Getrag 6-speed manual, feeding a pristine variable M differential lock. Every bushing and ball joint has been inspected for zero deflection, maintaining the razor-sharp turn-in the chassis is known for. The exterior retains its factory depth and luster, free of any structural or cosmetic imperfections. A mechanically flawless example for the serious driver.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Single owner. Flawless interior. Full service history.

This vehicle is a true showroom-quality specimen, meticulously maintained to preserve its original luster. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, scratches, or stone chips, protected by a professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in pristine condition, with the premium leather upholstery showing no signs of wear and all technological features functioning exactly as they did the day it left the factory. Mechanically, the car is flawless; it has been garaged its entire life and serviced exclusively at authorized dealerships with a complete, transparent history available. From the spotless engine bay to the untouched alloy wheels, every detail has been curated for the most discerning collector. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that looks, feels, and drives like it just rolled off the assembly line.

This exceptional vehicle represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector. Maintained to an uncompromising standard, the exterior retains its original showroom luster, while the interior remains in a pristine, original state. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, mirroring its factory-delivery condition. This is an investment-grade example of automotive excellence, offered for those who demand nothing less than perfection.

We are privileged to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an exacting standard that mirrors its original showroom delivery. This unit exhibits flawless mechanical integrity and an immaculate aesthetic profile, reflecting a history of meticulous preservation and climate-controlled storage. For the discerning buyer seeking a vehicle of uncompromising quality and investment-grade condition, this offering represents a premier acquisition opportunity.

Hey everyone! 👋 You have seriously got to see this beauty! I’ve babied this car since day one, and it’s honestly in absolutely pristine condition—it still has that new-car feel! It drives like a dream and looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I'm sad to see it go, but I know it's going to make its next owner so happy. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Offered is a concours-level E46 M3, featuring the high-revving S54B32 power plant with its signature individual throttle bodies and 8,000 RPM redline. This example has undergone a comprehensive preventative maintenance suite: the rear subframe has been reinforced with structural plates, the Vanos system has been fully overhauled with Beisan components, and rod bearings have been replaced. The Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission shifts with precision, delivering power through a variable M differential lock. The chassis remains taut, riding on original suspension geometry with no bushing fatigue. Finished in Carbon Black over Nappa leather, the paint depth is consistent across all panels, and the
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Clean title.

This vehicle is a true collector’s dream, preserved in absolute showroom condition. The exterior paint retains its deep, factory luster with zero imperfections, while the interior remains pristine, still carrying that new-car scent with supple, untouched leather seating and flawless trim. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach; every service has been performed ahead of schedule at certified dealerships, documented in a comprehensive maintenance log. This car has been strictly garage-kept under a breathable cover and has never seen a drop of rain. From the crystal-clear headlight lenses to the spotless undercarriage, every detail reflects a life of meticulous care. It drives exactly as it did the day it was delivered—smooth, powerful, and tight. This is a rare opportunity to own a virtually new example of a modern classic.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained to a rigorous showroom standard. This vehicle transcends the typical pre-owned category, offering a pristine aesthetic and uncompromising mechanical integrity. For the discerning driver who demands nothing less than perfection, this acquisition represents the definitive choice in its class.
